title: Budget policy support for Lakebase database instances and synced tables (Public Preview)
body:
You can now tag a database instance and a synced table with a budget policy to attribute billing usage to specific policies. Additionally, custom tags can be added to a database instance for more granular attribution of compute usage to teams, projects, or cost centers.

See [Update a serverless usage policy of a database instance](/aws/en/oltp/instances/create#update-policy), [Create a synced table](/aws/en/oltp/instances/sync-data/sync-table#create), and [Custom tags](/aws/en/admin/account-settings/usage-detail-tags#custom-tags).

ref_links.text: Update a serverless usage policy of a database instance
